creator: smyru@heron.pl
text:
On Tue, 5 Sep 2006 15:01:32 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote
> Maintainer of polish/gnugadu2,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/102908 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a 
> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you 
> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/102908

Hi,

I am maintainer of the port as well as the originator of the PR, 
as stated by the class. I have used web form to upload it into the 
database since I cannot get the PR database to accept my PRs when 
I send them via send-pr nor via gtk-send-pr. 

Best regards,
-- 
 Piotr Smyrak
 piotr.smyrak@heron.pl
